raw_consumer_statement: We have tried to dispute unauthorized charges by XXXX posted on our American Express XXXX XXXX account with the last 5 digits XXXX. XXXX XXXX has charged XXXX for 10 months straight and has refused my attempts to cancel after a supposed free trial. XXXX does not have any way to contact customer service by phone and their chat system is maned by chat bots, not real people, who try to make it impossible to cancel. This is fraudulent business practice and needs to be dealt with. American Express agents have told me that they are bound by XXXX XXXX 's cancellation policy. I need your assistance in getting XXXX returned to my account which has been fraudulently taken by XXXX. Thank you in advance for your attention in this matter.
